arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich boss Jürgen Klinsmann thinks Thomas Müller will rise to the occasion this week
arts.sum: If there is one person who is not doubting that outgoing club legend Thomas Müller can make an impact at Bayern Munich against Inter Milan and Borussia Dortmund this week, it is Jürgen Klinsmann. And I really hope from the bottom of my heart that there will be a real revival of Thomas Müller in these crucial weeks, and, of course, because they are currently hosting the final in their own stadium on May 31st in Munich with the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich eager to extend Konrad Laimer past 2027
arts.sum: Is Laimer Vincent Kompany’s long-term plan for right-back? Bayern are planning to extend Konrad Laimer’s contract beyond 2027.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: For the first time in history, Bayern Munich and Inter Milan will clash in the Champions League quarterfinal stage. Bayern Munich will host Inter Milan in the Champions League for a tough battle against a very balanced Serie A power.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane lavishes praise on Vincent Kompany’s coaching and remaining playing ability
arts.sum: I think he’s a great coach on the pitch,” the England captain said in a recent interview with Bundesliga’s official English account (via @iMiaSanMia ). The latest coach in charge of getting the best out of him is Vincent Kompany at Bayern Munich .
